BBB accredited, locally owned and operated by Mike and Michelle L'Hotta. Offers interior/exterior painting, decorative painting, staining, and senior/veteran discounts.
key_gaps: Outdated website design with poor visual hierarchy
No customer reviews or testimonials visible on site
No before/after project gallery or portfolio
No trust badges despite BBB accreditation claim
No team photos or crew bios
Content sections are thin and repetitive
No blog or educational content
No online booking or quote request form found in extracted content
No social media links visible
Limited SEO optimization - thin on-page content

address.note: General Colorado Springs area only - no street address

Offers packaged branding + website solutions with a clear 3-step process.
key_gaps: No portfolio or case studies section visible on main site

Limited SEO content - very little text for search engines
